name: 2x2ft LED Backlit Panel Light 5CCT & 5WATT selectable
description: The ZION LED USA 2x2ft LED Backlit Panel Light is a dynamic, energy-efficient lighting solution ideal for both commercial and residential spaces. With wattage selectable options of 20W, 25W, 30W, 35W, and 40W, and adjustable color temperatures from 3000K to 6500K, it offers tailored lighting to suit various environments. Its backlit design provides even, glare-free illumination, eliminating dark spots while enhancing visual comfort. ZION LED USA 2×2 Backlit LED Panel Light offers the perfect blend of performance, efficiency, and customizability—making it an excellent upgrade for any modern lighting project.
short_desc: 2x2ft LED Backlit Panel Light-Selectable Wattage 20W/25W/30W/35W/40W-Selectable CCT 3000K/3500K/4000K/5000K/6500K Key Features: Selectable Wattage: 20W / 25W / 30W / 35W / 40W for flexible energy use Adjustable CCT: 3000K / 3500K / 4000K / 5000K / 6500K Uniform Light Output: Backlit design for consistent brightness across the panel High Efficiency: Delivers high lumens per watt with minimal energy consumption Easy Installation: Designed for drop-in ceiling grids—ideal for retrofits or new installations Applications: Perfect for a variety of environments, including: Offices & Conference Rooms Retail Stores & Showrooms Educational Institutions Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities Residential Areas & Apartments Hotels & Restaurants
